howItWorks.intro: This pottery glaze calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Water Amount
rules.explanation: Water added as a percentage of total dry ingredients.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: About 100-200mL per medium pot, depending on application thickness.

faq.q: What is the ideal water ratio?
faq.a: Most glazes use 80-120% water by weight of dry materials for dipping consistency.
